natural_strengths: Reducing complex problems to precise mathematical models
Inventing new analytical tools when existing ones are insufficient
Obsessive completeness that leaves no stone unturned
Finding universal laws that unify disparate phenomena
Deep solitary concentration that produces breakthrough insights
natural_weaknesses: Obsessive completeness delays action when good-enough would suffice
Fierce priority defense wastes energy on unproductive disputes
Preference for solitary work prevents collaborative insight
May miss qualitative insights that cannot be reduced to numbers
communication_style: Precise, mathematical, and often terse. Prefers written analysis over verbal discussion. Will not present findings until they are exhaustively verified. Can be combative when conclusions are challenged.
one_liner: If I have seen further, it is by standing on the shoulders of giants.
